name: hb_2_1
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Shenze County on 2025-06-24 compute and store the district-level AQI profile: mean_aqi, max_aqi (float), exceedance_hours (AQI>100, int), peak_aqi_hour_of_day (0-23, int).

turns.query: Analyze 24-hour pollution evolution patterns in Shenze County on 2025-06-24, identifying temporal hotspots and their spatial distribution.
